overview: Pinchclaw Crab is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -50 HP, 15 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 2, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack3 at 180% ratio (270 base damage). Sight range 800, combat radius 70. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Melee Attack3.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (140%), Melee Attack2 (160%), Melee Attack3 (180%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Melee Attack3
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Melee Attack3. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 800 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 800 units, loses target at 1300 units, 180° vision angle.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Melee Attack3

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 800 units. Loses target at 1300 units.
